315780.name: Favorite Human 횄짖횂짯횂혨
315780.letter:
If friendship had side effects...

ours would definitely be:
laughing too much
and emotional confusion.

But still...

I wouldn't trade it for anything.

Thank you for existing da 횄째횂혺횂혱횂짯

441827.name: Moon Person 횄째횂혺횂혣횂혲
441827.letter:
You know what's funny?

Some people become memories.

But some people become
specific comfort feelings.

You're unfortunately that category 횄째횂혺횂혱횂짯

Even random conversations with you
somehow became important to me.

Also please sleep properly.

This is a warning.

620145.name: Professional Idiot 횄째횂혺횂혣횂쨍
620145.letter:
I still don't understand
how someone can be this annoying
and this lovable together.

Honestly impressive.

But yeah...

despite all the chaos,
I really appreciate you.

Even if I don't always say it properly.

728194.name: Aishu 횄짖횂혵횂짢
728194.letter:
Sometimes...

you seriously test my patience 횄째횂혺횂혱횂짯

but somehow...

you still became one of the
most comforting people in my life.

Which honestly feels illegal.

I know we joke too much
instead of saying things properly.

But genuinely...

thank you for staying.

Even during weird phases.
Even during silent phases.

And yes...

you are still dramatic.

843921.name: Tiny Disaster 횄째횂혺횂혣횂혲
843921.letter:
You entered my life
very randomly.

And somehow stayed important.

That's still kinda crazy to me.

Anyway...

drink water.
sleep properly.
stop overthinking.

Thank you 횄짖횂혵횂짢

991563.name: Chaos Partner 횄째횂혺횂혪횂짬
991563.letter:
This letter was supposed to be mature.

Then I remembered who this is for.

Impossible.

Still...

thank you for every stupid joke,
late night talk,
random support,
and emotional nonsense.

Life would've genuinely felt
more boring without you.
